ready_position.label: Ready Position
ready_position.description: Assess the player's ready position immediately before initiating movement towards the shot.

max_take_back.label: Max Take Back
max_take_back.description: Assess the moment of maximum preparation immediately before the forward swing begins.

contact_point.label: Contact Point
contact_point.description: Assess the instant the player makes contact with the ball, or the best estimate where contact occurs.

max_follow_through.label: Max Follow Through
max_follow_through.description: Assess the point at which the follow-through reaches its maximum extent before recovery begins.

recovery_position.label: Recovery Position
recovery_position.description: Assess the player's return towards a balanced ready position after completing the shot.
